---
title: "Vignette for the Jack405 Package"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette for the Jack405 Package}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(Jack405)
install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
```
